meta.description: Defines a data pipeline as an ordered sequence of functions, each consuming the previous step's output

ai-instructions.claude: A Pipeline is a template — it defines the shape of a run but does not execute. 'inputType' is either a Kanecta type UUID or a TypeScript primitive string. Each step declares the Function UUID to call and the Kanecta type UUID of the object it produces. The output of step N becomes the input of step N+1. To execute a pipeline, create a Pipeline Run item.
